host.title: Host
host.description: Hostname of the Meilisearch instance, including protocol (e.g. http://localhost:7700).

api_key.title: API Key
api_key.description: Meilisearch API Key with read and write access. Leave blank if the instance has no key configured. See the docs.

batch_size.title: Batch Size
batch_size.description: Number of records to buffer before flushing them to Meilisearch in a single indexing task.

update_method.title: Update Method
update_method.description: How to write documents that share a primary key. 'replace' fully overwrites the stored document; 'merge' performs a partial update, keeping fields not present in the incoming record.
